_note: Curated deployment record for the Ethereum Sepolia B1 C2/R3 multi-vault stack (sTBILL). Mirrors the deployments/ convention (cf. multivault-84532.json + openassets-vaults-11155111.json).
_provenance: Core addresses carried from @straton/blockchain CONTRACT_ADDRESSES[11155111] (>= 1.3.0), themselves sourced from the B1 C2/R3 redeploy (2026-05-18). Implementations recovered on-chain via the EIP-1967 implementation slot; identityRegistry read via token.identityRegistry() (returns 0x0 — whitelist is an internal per-token mapping, no shared IdentityRegistry, consistent with the 2026-05-26 KYC finding). Every address verified to have non-empty bytecode on Eth Sepolia. The full ERC-3643 registry/module set is not captured here — recover from the deploy broadcast if needed.
stack: C2/R3 — TransparentUpgradeableProxy + per-proxy ProxyAdmin owned by TimelockController(48h); operator holds only WHITELIST_AGENT_ROLE + MINTER_ROLE (AGENT_ROLE split via R3); AGENT_ROLE + DEFAULT_ADMIN on the Cold Safe.

supersedes._reason: Pre-B1 stack (0xb229.../0x7f7c... — Base Sep) is dead on this chain; stfToken was NOT redeployed by B1 (carried over, verified to have code on Eth Sepolia).
